title: Adv. Lakshmanan Ladies Only
overview: Advocate Lakshmanan fights women's divorce cases. He owns a pickle company run by divorcees. He receives phone calls from Annie whom he later marries only to realize that he is being implicated in the murder of Alex's wife. Lakshmanan investigates the case and stumbles upon a shocking truth.
